top_signals.title: Strait of Hormuz oil backlog could take weeks to clear after US-Iran deal
top_signals.summary: Prices slip even as analysts warn flows may be slow to recover and remain vulnerable to renewed disruption
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Korea’s JoongAng Seeks Rehabilitation After Broadcaster Default
top_signals.summary: South Korean media giant JoongAng Group has filed for court rehabilitation after its broadcaster defaulted on a loan, with the company hit by financial strain linked to its purchase of expensive sports broadcasting rights acquired at the peak of the media market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Potential liquidity or banking-system instability affecting financial conditions.

top_signals.title: Singapore to Begin Gold Clearing This Year in Push to Become Hub
top_signals.summary: Singapore plans to launch a gold-clearing system this year, with banks including JPMorgan Chase & Co. and Deutsche Bank AG set to participate in the city-state’s push to become a hub in the global bullion market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
